{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"2026032016330114A11CEB61C39E06FA7C\"}"},"total":490},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7053761645940294440","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"此书整体风格诙谐幽默，寥寥数语便将一个个朝代的兴衰更替描绘得活灵活现，是本值得一读的好书。\n不过，也有一小部分知识点解读不够精确，但瑕不掩瑜，读完依旧意犹未尽。\n对于想从宏观上了解我国古代历史兴衰变换的史学爱好者而言，此书是不错的选择。 书中不仅有故事情节的演绎，还有作者自身观点的输出，棒棒哒！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1642331869,"group_id":"7011072848416476174","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"流淌在笔尖的世界并不比现实逊色！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9RJwqmFxeNwAgJnXaLpk877rd29m2OA6wMCP5SgQMRc","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/80de5c25a8524bef819836b8570b0789~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776528546\u0026x-signature=pzDrzrDzCZDyf0JPxakxbZOJugw%3D","user_id":"3196981789341389","user_name":"梧桐不言"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3196981789341389","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1708484066,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{\"title_name\":\"作家\",\"title_id\":\"author\"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{\"title_text\":\"作家\",\"title_default_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"title_dark_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"bg_default_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#FF9F31\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#FFB95C\\\"}\",\"bg_dark_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#CC8029\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#CC9349\\\"}\",\"title_dark_diaphaneity\":\"CC\"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7011072848416476174","book_info":{"abstract":"看半小时漫画，通三千年历史，脉络无比清晰，看完就能倒背。仅仅通过手绘和段子，二混子就捋出清晰的历史大脉络：春秋战国像个班级、大秦过把瘾就死、三国就三大战役、魏晋乱世多奇葩、南北朝盛产败家子、大唐最炫民族风……掀开纷繁复杂的历史表象，略去无关紧要的细枝末节，每一页都有历史段子，每三秒让你笑翻一次，而二混子手绘的帝王将相则是又贱又蠢萌：秦皇、汉武、唐宗、宋祖、曹操、孙权，全都和你我一样，有优点和缺陷，有朋友和敌人，他们在历史关键节点迸发出的惊人能量铸就了三千年的精彩中国史。而你在笑出腹肌的同时，不知不觉已经通晓了历史。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-images/4e6e7df0aa9d90148a8f5401f2803c6b~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"二混子","author_id":"","book_id":"7011072848416476174","book_name":"半小时漫画中国史（全五册）","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e89060","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"93.6万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":12,\"name\":\"历史\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12\u0026name=历史\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=2\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":241,\"name\":\"历史文化\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=241\u0026name=历史文化\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=2\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7011074796368694287","read_count":"3523","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"150809"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.6","serial_count":"62","tags":"历史,历史文化","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-images/4e6e7df0aa9d90148a8f5401f2803c6b~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779179581\u0026x-signature=xiLi3LVWgtg8f9IPiPZxg9ql4yk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1948796008793927","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"5.4941145e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"2026032016330114A11CEB61C39E06FA7C\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读15小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":44,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":54941,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":14569},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7229255224106877696","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"幽默风趣通俗易懂，不足的是个别地方出现错误，影响观感了，幸而段评还有书友矫正，可以给一些不怎么了解历史的人避免错误认知."},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1683192210,"group_id":"7011072848416476174","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"某年某月某天.","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7zY/jPsVWr8r8YMPN43I9UgKoS0PHUWlok4k0LD83kO","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/633f67dbd7484623a0c189ba909bb545~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776528192\u0026x-signature=aMR%2Bhtmw%2FlFv2veyGQs5f4STT9w%3D","user_id":"3799503999089358","user_name":"叶某某了"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3799503999089358","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1734167502,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7011072848416476174","book_info":{"abstract":"看半小时漫画，通三千年历史，脉络无比清晰，看完就能倒背。仅仅通过手绘和段子，二混子就捋出清晰的历史大脉络：春秋战国像个班级、大秦过把瘾就死、三国就三大战役、魏晋乱世多奇葩、南北朝盛产败家子、大唐最炫民族风……掀开纷繁复杂的历史表象，略去无关紧要的细枝末节，每一页都有历史段子，每三秒让你笑翻一次，而二混子手绘的帝王将相则是又贱又蠢萌：秦皇、汉武、唐宗、宋祖、曹操、孙权，全都和你我一样，有优点和缺陷，有朋友和敌人，他们在历史关键节点迸发出的惊人能量铸就了三千年的精彩中国史。而你在笑出腹肌的同时，不知不觉已经通晓了历史。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-images/4e6e7df0aa9d90148a8f5401f2803c6b~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"二混子","author_id":"","book_id":"7011072848416476174","book_name":"半小时漫画中国史（全五册）","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e89060","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"93.6万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":12,\"name\":\"历史\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail
